Patch Set 8:

Since this needs to be refreshed I was thinking that the new code could be placed in a liblustreapi_fid.c file that is LGPL. There is a bunch fid functions in lustre_idl.h still left and we have a bunch fid functionally in liblustreapi core that could be rewritten so it could fall under LGPL as well.

Patch Set 8:

James, I'm working towards that, however there's a lot of other things that need to get removed from lustre_idl.h in LU-6401 first, otherwise the whole thing goes horribly wrong.

Patch Set 8:

This is about as ugly as the existing solution.

What about adding our own printf converter instead? See https://www.gnu.org/software/libc/manual/html_node/Customizing-Printf.html

Patch Set 8:

That is cool. Never knew about registering your own printf handling.

Patch Set 8:

Yep, working on a version with that now.

Patch Set 8: Code-Review-1

This is worse than using PFID and DFID and so is using a custom printf converter.

Patch Set 8:

Looks good to me.

Patch Set 8: Code-Review-1

This change cannot be cherry-picked to master.
Please rebase the change locally and upload the rebased commit for review.

Patch Set 8:

(5 comments)

5 style warning(s).
For more details please see http://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_Coding_Style_Guidelines

commit.subject: LU-7557 headers: add fid_to_str and str_to_fid
commit.message:
LU-7557 headers: add fid_to_str and str_to_fid

Add functions to convert fids to and from strings
Add examples

Signed-off-by: Ben Evans <bevans@cray.com>
Change-Id: Ie8bb619f3263db450377b311743927e863fa16e3
